---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesFactor)
library(BayesianId)

data(mtcars)
data("epilepsy")
```

```{r}
mtcars %>% select(mpg, disp, wt) %>% cor() %>% round(2)
```

```{r}
contr.helmert(5)
```
```{r}
fwd_helmert = function(a){
  contr = matrix(0.0, nrow = a, ncol = a - 1)
  for(cl in 1:(a-1)){
    n = a - cl + 1
    contr[cl, cl] = (n-1)/n
    contr[(cl+1):a, cl] = -1/n
  }
  return(contr)
}

contr_banova = function(a){
  contr = fwd_helmert(a)
  for(cl in 1:(a-1)){
    contr[,cl] = contr[,cl]/sqrt(sum(contr[,cl]^2))
  }
  return(contr)
}
```

```{r}
fwd_helmert(5)
```
```{r}
contr_banova(5)
```
```{r}
a = 4
Q = contr_banova(a)
round(Q%*%diag(a-1)%*%t(Q), 2) %>% print()
I = diag(a)
J = matrix(1.0, nrow = a, ncol = a)
round(I - J/a, 2) %>% print()
```




```{r}
contr_comp = matrix(c(0.89, -0.22, -0.22, -0.22, -0.22,
                      0, 0.87, -0.29, -0.29, -0.29,
                      0, 0, 0.82, -0.41, -0.41,
                      0, 0, 0, 0.71, -0.71),
                    nrow = 4,
                    ncol = 5,
                    byrow = TRUE) %>% t()
print(contr_comp)
```



```{r}
fit <- brm_jzs(mpg ~ disp + wt,
               #mpg ~ disp + wt + disp:wt, 
               data = mtcars, 
               family = gaussian(),
               #r = sqrt(2)/4,
               r = 1,
               iter = 10000,
               )
```

```{r}
stancode(fit)
```

```{r}
# IT LOOKS LIKE THE PRIOR SCALE ("r") ISN'T AFFECTING THE BFS
# LOOK INTO THIS
result = inc_tests(fit)
print(result$inc_table)
```
```{r}
print(result$model_table)
```

```{r}
result_comp = regressionBF(mpg ~ disp + wt, data = mtcars, rscaleCont = 1)
result_comp/result_comp[3]
```
